features.name: Repository Harness and Baseline Verification
features.description: Create the startup harness, define the current project scope, and make the empty/early repository restartable for agent-assisted development.
done_criteria: AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, init.sh, and init.ps1 exist
Baseline verifier runs without requiring application code
Current objective and first implementation phase are explicit
features.evidence: 2026-06-04: Created startup harness files. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File init.ps1. Structural harness validation passed with Overall 100/100.

features.name: Phase 1 - Protocol Base Objects and Storage
features.description: Implement TaskSpec, TaskUnit, TaskRelation, ClientRecord, ArtifactRef, ArtifactStore, LedgerEvent, JSONL EventLedger, and base ProtocolConfig.
done_criteria: Root task can be registered
Root input artifact can be saved and content-hash checked
Event ledger can append and read events
features.evidence: 2026-06-04: Design prerequisite completed for Phase 1 technology stack. Updated Doc/TechnicalDocument/2026-06-03-tokenshare-protocol-technical-design.md to choose Python 3.12+, SQLite, JSON, JSONL, and local filesystem storage for V1; external workflow/distributed systems remain design references only. Verification passed with .\init.ps1. 2026-06-04: Added reference_repos/ with shallow sparse source snapshots for package-layout research: Temporal Python SDK, Luigi, cwltool, Prefect, and Dagster. Updated startup compileall to exclude reference_repos/ because it is external reference source, not TokenShare runtime code. 2026-06-05: Created initial src/tokenshare package layout and mirrored tests skeleton; updated init scripts so pytest runs with PYTHONPATH=src now that tests/ exists. Verification passed with powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File E:\TokenEcnomic\TokenShare\init.ps1; pytest ran tests\test_package_layout.py with 1 passed. 2026-06-05: Added Doc/agent-navigation.md to document fact-source priority, module routing, and reference_repo usage rules. 2026-06-05: Moved agent navigation out of Doc/TechnicalDocument/ into Doc/agent-navigation.md and kept it navigation-only; verification passed with init.ps1 and harness validation returned Overall 100/100.

features.name: Phase 2 - Task Graph, State Machines, and Scheduling
features.description: Implement TaskGraph, TaskUnit state transitions, Lease and Attempt state machines, Scheduler, and LeaseManager.
done_criteria: Ready nodes can be scheduled
Expired leases return tasks to Ready when retry policy permits
All state transitions are written to the event ledger

features.name: Phase 3 - Plugin and Executor Contracts
features.description: Implement PluginRegistry, ExecutorRegistry, ExecutionRequest, ExecutionSubmission, MockAIExecutor, and deterministic executor boundary.
done_criteria: Plugin versions are fixed during a run
Executors receive a unified request and return a unified submission
AI-style path can persist PromptPackage and RawModelOutput references

features.name: Phase 4 - Verification, Canonical Output, and Expansion
features.description: Implement common data checks, plugin-domain verification orchestration, first_verified_bundle selection, ExpansionDecision, and atomic graph updates.
done_criteria: Only one canonical output bundle can bind per TaskUnit
expand creates child nodes and dependency edges atomically
Invalid expansion does not mutate the task graph

features.name: Phase 5 - Merge, Contribution, and Sandbox Settlement
features.description: Implement plugin merge orchestration, ContributionRecord state machine, SettlementEngine, sandbox reward formula, and subtree pruning.
done_criteria: Canonical child outputs can merge into parent output
Intermediate contribution can settle after downstream success
Root completion generates exactly one sandbox settlement

features.name: Phase 6 - Experiments, Fault Simulation, and Metrics
features.description: Implement factorization plugin, Lean stub plugin, SimulationProfile, SimulationWrapper, ExperimentRunner, and MetricsCollector.
done_criteria: Factorization experiment completes end to end
Lean stub completes one direct proof path and one decomposition path
Five fault profiles produce expected recovery behavior
Metrics report is generated

features.name: Phase 7 - Replay and Audit
features.description: Implement state replay, audit replay, replay consistency checks, and no-double-settlement verification.
done_criteria: Final state can be rebuilt from JSONL events
Replay does not call AI or executor code
Replay does not produce duplicate SettlementRecord entries
